product_name: Gyeon Q²m Clay Lube Redefined Kil Kaydırıcı Yoğun Konsantre - 500 ml

sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M CLAYLUBE REDEFINED

Exterior / Preparation

Concentrated and ultra slick clay lubricant.

Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED is a neutral clay lubricant developed to work safely with all types of clay bars. It provides extreme slickness, allowing the clay to glide smoothly across the surface without grabbing or marring the paint, while remaining safe for even the most delicate clay types.

Concentrated and ultra-slick clay lubricant.
Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED reduces friction during the claying process and helps reveal a smooth surface without staining or damaging paintwork. Its concentrated formula allows dilution without compromising performance.

Key Benefits:
- Slickness for safe decontamination
- Highly concentrated
- Suitable on all surfaces

What makes Q2M CLAYLUBE REDEFINED so special?
- Extreme slickness to minimise marring during claying
- Safe for all clay bars, cloths and discs

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
Capacities: 500 ML
Slickness: EXTREME
pH Level: NEUTRAL

HOW TO USE:
01. Dilute Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED as required or use neat.
02. Spray generously onto the surface to be clayed.
03. Glide the clay gently over the lubricated area.
04. Keep the surface well lubricated at all times.
05. Wipe off residue after claying is complete.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Is Q²M ClayLube REDEFINED safe for all paint types?
Yes. It is neutral and safe for delicate surfaces.

Can it be diluted?
Yes. It can be diluted up to 1:25.

Does it stain paint or trim?
No. It does not stain surfaces.

Can it be used with any clay product?
Yes. It works with clay bars, cloths and discs.

Is it suitable for professional use?
Yes. It is suitable for enthusiasts and professionals.

sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Clay Lube REDEFINED 500mL

Sale price: $23.99 AUD
Tax included.
SKU: 116029

Same Day Dispatch on orders before 12pm

Q²M ClayLube Redefined is an unmatched claying aid designed to enhance your detailing process by providing superior lubrication and protection. Compatible with all types of clay bars, it ensures a smooth, safe, and effective claying experience.

Product Features and Benefits:
- Extreme Slickness: Reduces friction and prevents clay from grabbing or marring the surface, allowing for a smooth and effortless glide.
- Neutral Formula: Safe for use with all clay types and manufacturers, it does not affect or stain delicate paint surfaces.
- Highly Concentrated: Can be diluted up to a 1:25 ratio, providing excellent economy while maintaining optimal performance and lubrication.

Q²M ClayLube Redefined has extreme slickness which reduces friction and prevents the clay from grabbing and marring the surface, instead the clay will slip over it to reveal smooth paint. Ideally used with Q²M Clay for best results, but it can be used with any clay bars, cloths or discs to lubricate. Q²M ClayLube Redefined can be diluted down as far as a 1:25 ratio, which offers great economy, without impacting on its high performance and still allowing good lubrication for the clay to do its job. The lubricant enhances the effectiveness of the cleaning process and prevents scratching or marring of the vehicle's surface.

Gyeon Q2M Clay Lube Redefined is safe for use on all exterior surfaces, including paint, glass, and trim, and provides long-lasting protection that is easy to maintain. Its quick and easy application process means you can achieve a clean, contaminant-free finish in just a few minutes.

pH Level: Neutral
Slickness: Extreme

How to Use:

Step 1: Prepare the Surface
Wash and dry your vehicle thoroughly before using the Gyeon Q2M Clay Lube. This will help ensure that any loose dirt and debris has been removed from the surface. For best results, use a high-quality car wash soap and a microfiber towel to dry the vehicle.

Step 2: Shake the Bottle
Shake the bottle of Gyeon Q2M Clay Lube well before use to ensure that the formula is well mixed.

Step 3: Apply the Lube
Spray the Gyeon Q2M Clay Lube directly onto the surface you will be working on. Apply a generous amount of lubricant, enough to keep the surface wet while using the clay bar. This will help prevent any scratching or marring of the paint surface.

Step 4: Use the Clay Bar
Take the clay bar and knead it into a flat, circular shape. Gently rub the clay bar over the lubricated surface in a back and forth motion, applying light pressure. The clay bar will pick up and remove any contaminants from the surface. Fold the clay bar over frequently to expose a clean surface and continue until the entire surface has been treated.

Step 5: Wipe Away Residue
After using the clay bar, wipe away any remaining residue or lubricant with a clean microfiber towel. This will reveal a smooth, clean surface free from contaminants.

Step 6: Repeat if Necessary
If necessary, repeat the process on any areas that still have visible contaminants. Be sure to knead and fold the clay bar frequently to expose a clean surface and avoid reintroducing any contaminants back onto the surface.

Step 7: Store the Clay Bar
After use, be sure to store the clay bar in a clean, dry place to prevent it from becoming contaminated. You can reuse the clay bar several times before it needs to be replaced.

sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q²M Clay Lube REDEFINED 500ml Super Concentrated 1:25

Regular price: $25.00 CAD
Barcode: 8809432672203

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Clay Lubricant
Gyeon ClayLube is neutral and designed to work with any type and brand of clay bars. It does not affect the clay and remains safe for even the most delicate bars. Additionally, it does not cause any staining on the paint, making your claying process extremely easy.

SLICK AND CONCENTRATED
Gyeon ClayLube offers extreme slickness, reducing friction to prevent the clay from 'grabbing' and marring the surface. Instead, the clay effortlessly slips over the surface, revealing smooth paint. While ideally used with Gyeon Clay for optimal results, it can be applied with any clay bars, towels, mitts, or discs for lubrication. It can be diluted down to a 1:10 ratio, providing excellent economy without compromising its high performance, ensuring effective lubrication for the clay to perform its job.

Tips & Tricks
The formula of Gyeon ClayLube allows for dilution up to 1:10 without compromising the slickness of the product. This versatility makes it an excellent choice for both professional detailers and enthusiasts. We recommend diluting the product less for heavier decontamination.
TIP: Spray generously on one panel at a time. Rinse the car after completing the claying process to easily remove any potential streaks.

FAQ:

Can I use QuickDetailer or soapy water as Claylube?
Yes, but Gyeon Clay Lube is way more cost-effective, safe, and provides much better slickness. Quick Detailer can be costly, and soapy water could potentially stain the paint if not rinsed in time.

Can it be used on Glass, Trim, and other surfaces?
Yes, it can be applied over the contaminated parts of your vehicle after the washing process and before paint correction.

How to store the product after use? What is the shelf life once opened?
Secure the sprayer in a closed position. Store it in a dry, dark, and cool place. Do not allow it to freeze, and avoid exposure to sunlight.

Features:
- ULTRA SLICK - Q2M Clay Lube has extreme slickness which reduces friction and prevents the clay from 'grabbing' and marring the surface, instead the clay will slip over it to reveal smooth paint.
- SUPER CONCENTRATED - Q2M ClayLube can be diluted down as far as a 1:10 ratio, which offers a great economy, without impacting on its high performance and still allowing good lubrication for the clay to do its job.
- WORKS WITH ANY CLAY BAR - Q2M ClayLube is totally neutral and developed to work with any type and manufacture of clay bars. It does not affect the clay and remains safe for the most delicate bars.
- Ideally used with Q2M Clay for best results, but it can be used with any clay kit bars, clay bar mitt, clay towel, or discs to lubricate.
- APPLICATION - GYEON Q2M Clay Lube's superior slickness makes it an excellent choice for professional detailers as well as enthusiasts. TIP: Spray generously at one panel at a time. Rinse the car after the claying process is finished to easily remove any potential streaks.

Meet Q²M ClayLube Redefined, your go-to choice for clay bar lubrication. Designed to be completely neutral, it seamlessly pairs with any type of clay bar without compromising its integrity. Gentle yet effective, it ensures the safety of even the most delicate clay bars while leaving no stains on your vehicle's paintwork.

EXTREMELY SLICK & CONCENTRATED
Experience the unrivaled slickness of Q²M ClayLube Redefined, engineered to minimize friction and prevent clay from 'grabbing' or marring surfaces. Instead, it glides effortlessly, revealing flawlessly smooth paint with each pass. While ideally paired with Q²M Clay EVO for optimal results, it seamlessly lubricates any clay bars, cloths, or discs. Plus, with its impressive dilution ratio of up to 1:25, you can achieve exceptional economy without compromising its high performance, ensuring the clay can efficiently perform its task while maintaining superb lubrication.

REDEFINED
Introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we've elevated our already acclaimed chemical formulas to new heights. Through meticulous reworking and refining, we've achieved unparalleled performance, exceptional durability, and effortless usability. Our dedication remains unwavering—to provide our customers with nothing short of the finest user experience.

PRO TIP
The unique formula of Q²M ClayLube Redefined retains its exceptional slickness even when diluted up to 1:25, making it an ideal option for both professional detailers and enthusiasts alike.
TIP: Generously spray one panel at a time for optimal results. After completing the claying process, simply rinse the car to easily remove any potential streaks.

PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
SLICKNESS: EXTREME

Gyeon Q2M ClayLube

Regular price: $15.95
In stock, ready to ship

Gyeon ClayLube is extremely slick which reduces friction and helps to prevent the clay from 'grabbing' and marring the surface.

Ideally used with Gyeon Clay for best results, Clay Lube can be used with any clay bars, cloths or discs to lubricate very well. Some marring may occur, so plan to perform paint correction after using Q2M Clay and Q2M ClayLube Redefined.

Gyeon ClayLube Redefined can be diluted down as far as a 1:10 ratio, which offers great economy, without impacting its high performance and still allowing good lubrication for the clay to do its job. ClayLube is very dense, so only small amounts of the product are required to get the right lubrication.

ClayLube Redefined is totally neutral and developed to work with any brand of clay bar. It does not affect the clay and remains safe for the most delicate bars. At the same time it does not cause any staining on the paint.

Contents: 500ml
